allow: PowerShell(cd "E:\\Fake News Detection System\\fake_news_app"; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit', '-Command', 'cd "E:\\Fake News Detection System\\fake_news_app"; streamlit run app.py' -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Write-Host "Streamlit launched in new window")
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8501" -TimeoutSec 8 -UseBasicParsing; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) — app is up" } catch { "Not reachable yet: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8501" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) — app is UP and serving" } catch { "Unreachable: $_" })
